title: coleosanthus frutescens
intro: Coleosanthus frutescens, also known as Brazilian damiana, is a plant species in the genus Coleosanthus, native to South America. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleosanthus frutescens include potential relief from anxiety, insomnia, and other stress-related issues, as well as improved cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures for use in treating various health conditions.
